nodes.label: Regression tests for the Kimi/Moonshot quirks migrated into the transport.
Aggregator routes (Nous, OpenRouter) hit Moonshot by model name, not base URL.
Other models don't go through the Moonshot sanitizer.
LM Studio publishes per-model reasoning ``allowed_options``. When the     user r
Gemini 3 thinking models attach extra_content with thought_signature         on
DeepSeek/Moonshot use reasoning_content distinct from reasoning.         Don't m
DeepSeek can require an explicit empty reasoning_content replay field.
OpenAI SDK can expose provider-specific DeepSeek fields via model_extra.
